name: S3 Source Connector
description: Ingest from Amazon S3 or S3-compatible storage: list objects under a prefix (ListObjectsV2). Full file parsing is a separate concern; this connector exposes listing as the native mesh primitive.

entity.name: Amazon S3 Source
entity.description: List and read metadata for objects in an S3 bucket; credentials via IAM role or static keys.

bucket.help: Required. S3 bucket name (3–63 chars); mirrors S3SourceConfigSchema.

access_key_id.help: Optional if using IAM role on the worker; often supplied via connector api_key.

secret_access_key.help: Optional; often supplied via connector api_secret.

force_path_style.help: Boolean in JSON for path-style addressing when using custom endpoints.

connection_config_spec.help: Credentials via api_key/api_secret or IAM-capable deployment; bucket/region/prefix in custom_settings. Runtime uses AWS SDK in platform-backend.

connector_package.description: Connector = connection to object storage; inbound listing is implemented in the platform native provider (AWS SDK). Entity, auth, and custom_settings_schema are the declarative contract from this repo.
follow_up_notes: Runtime: S3SourceConnector under providers/s3-source/ — not CatalogRuntimeConnector.
custom_settings_schema mirrors S3SourceConfigSchema for UX/docs; zod in platform-backend remains the runtime validator.
Object body download / format decode can be added as further native operations or mesh steps after listing.
